verses.text: Tuazawh tawlkhat khit ciangin khuapite leh khuaneute-ah a ban banin Jesuh pai a, Pasian' Ukna hangin Lungdamna Thu hilhin a vak kawikawi hi. Tua a vak kawikawina-ah nungzui sawmlenihte
leh a sungpan dawi a hawlkhiatsakte leh natna tuamtuam pan a damsak numei pawlkhat in zong a zui uh hi. Tua numeite: A sung panin dawi sagih a kihawlkhiatna Mary (Magdala khuami Mary a kicinu
Herod' khutnuai-a ulian Khuza' zi Joanna, Susanna, leh numei dang tampite hi uh a, amau' neihsa tawh Jesuh leh a nungzuite a huh uh hi.
Khua khat khit khua khat panin Jesuh kiangah a hong pai mi hong kibehlaplap a, mi tampi tak hong om ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna khat gen a
“Khaici vawhpa khaici vawh dingin a kuankhia hi. Khaici a vawh ciangin pawlkhatte lampidung tu a, khe tawh kisik gawpin vasate in a ne hi
Pawlkhatte, suang kitawphahna leilak tu a, a po tei hangin leisung a nom tamlo ahih manin a vulkik pah hi
Pawlkhatte, lingbulsum omna leilak tu a, lingte a khan' ciangin a deplum hi
Pawlkhatte, leihoihna lak tu-in khang a, a zah za khat ciangdong a piang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh nakpi takin kiko a, “Zakna ding bil a neite in hih thu za ta un,” ci-in a thugen a khum hi.
Hih thugentehna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in a nungzuite in a dot ciangin

Jesuh in, “Pasian' Ukna thu tawh kisai thusim, note tungah hong kigen hi. Ahi zongin midangte in, en en napi-un a muhlohna ding za za napi-un a tellohna dingun amaute tungah thugentehna tawh thu kigen hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Khaici Vawhpa Thugentehna Telgen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Thugentehna a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi: Khaici pen Pasian' thu hi
Lamdungah khaici a tukna munte pen Pasian' thu a zate a cihnopna ahi hi. Tuate in Pasian' thu a zak hangun a thu umloin, hotkhiatna a ngahlohna dingun Dawimangpa hong pai-in a lakkhiatsak hi

Suang kitawphah leilak a tukna munte pen Pasian' thu a zak ciangin lungdam takin a sangte a cihna ahi hi. Ahi zongin amaute sungah thuktumlo ahih manin tawlkhat sung bek um uh a, ze-etna hun a tun' ciangin a puk uh hi
Lingbulsum omna a tukna munte pen Pasian' thu za napi-in a nuntakna sung uhah leitung lunghihmawhna, hauhna, leh nopsaknate in depgawp ahih manin bangmah a suakkhia zolote a cihnopna ahi hi
Leihoih a tukna munte pen Pasian' thu a zak ciangin lungsimtak tawh a thu mangin kip tawntung uh ahih manin amau-a' dingin man a neite a cihnopna ahi hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mei a vak khit ciangin lawh a khuh ahi a, lupna nuai-ah a koih ahi zongin kuamah omlo hi. Innsungah a lut uh ciangin mite in khua a muhtheihna dingin meivak koihna kho sangah koih bek uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh, thusimin a kikoih peuhmah, khatvei teitei thulang a suaklo ding, a kiselcip peuhmah, khatvei teitei a kipholaklo ding, bangmah omlo hi

Tua ahih ciangin thu na ngaih uh ciangin limtakin kingaihsun un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neisa mipa tungah Pasian in piathuah ding a, a neilo mipa tung panin themkhat nei-a a kingaihsut nangawn lakkhiatsak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua laitakin Jesuh' nu leh a naute hong pai uh a, ahi zongin mihon kinehlua uh ahih manin ama kiangah pai theilo uh hi
Tua ahih manin mi khat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na nu leh na naute in nang hong munuam uh a, innpua-ah om uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a dawn'na-in mihon khempeuh tungah, “Pasian' thu za a, a zuite khempeuh pen ka nu leh ka sanggamte ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Nikhat, Jesuh a nungzuite tawh gunkuang tungah tuang a, amaute kiangah, “Tuili galkhatah pai ni,” ci-in a pai uh hi
Tua bangin a pai laitakun Jesuh a ihmu hi. Tui tungah nakpi takin huihpi hong nungin gunkuang sungah tui dim dingin hong kipan a, lauhuai mahmah hi

Nungzuite in Jesuh hong naihin phong uh a, “Topa aw, Topa aw, kote ka si dektak uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Jesuh zong tho-in huihpi leh tui kilok a daihna dingin thu pia a, a thupiak bangin hong dai dide pah hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Na upna uh koi-ah om khinta ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amaute lau-in lamdangsa uh a, khatlekhat in, “Hihpa kua ahi hiam? Thu a piak ciangin huihpi leh tuihualte nangawn in a thu mang uh hi,” a kici uh hi.
Tua ciangin Galilee Tuili galkhat, Gadara gam a tung uh hi

Gunkuang tung panin leilakah Jesuh hong paisuk laitakin tua khuasunga om dawivei mi khat in a na dawn hi. Tua dawiveipa pen sauveipi sung puan silhloin omkhin a, inn-ah zong omloin han lak khawngah om tawntung hi

Jesuh a muh ciangin nakpi takin awngin a mai-ah khukdin' a, “A Lian Pasian' Tapa Jesuh aw, kei bang hong nuammawh na hi hiam? Kei, gim nong piaklohna dingin ka hong thum hi,” ci-in nakpi takin a kiko hi

Hih bangin a cihna pen, ama sung panin dawi a paikhiatna dingin Jesuh in thu a piakna hang ahi hi. Dawi in tua mipa tamveipi tak man a, a khut leh a khete sikkhau tawh khihin a kikepcip hangin a sikkhaute peksat a, dawi in gamlakah a paikhiatpih hi
Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, ama sungah dawi tampi lut ahih manin, “A Honpi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Leihawm thukpi sungah amaute a khiatlohna dingin Jesuh kiangah a thum uh hi
Tua laitakin tua kiim mualpang to-ah vok honpi khat gamta-in a om hi. Tua vokte sungah a luttheihna dingun dawite in Jesuh kiangah thum uh a, Jesuh in zong amau' ngetna bangin a pia hi
Tua ahih manin dawite zong mipa sung panin paikhia-in vokte sungah lut uh a, vokte zong tui gei keen tung khawngah tuaksuk gawpin a vekpi-in tui a kia hi
Vokcingte in hih thupiang a muh uh ciangin amaute tai-in khuasung leh gamsung tengah a zasak uh hi
Hih thupiang a en dingin mite hong pai uh a, Jesuh kiang a tun' uh ciangin dawi a paikhiatna mipa Jesuh kiangah omin, puan silhin, a pilkikna thu a muh uh ciangin a vekpi-un lamdangsa-in a lau uh hi
Tua thupiang a mu masa mite in dawiveipa a damnazia thute, amaute tungah a na gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Gadara gam kiima om khempeuh lau mahmah uh ahih manin Jesuh a paikhiatna dingin a sawl uh hi. Jesuh zong gunkuang tungah tuangin a ciah hi
Dawi a paikhiatna mipa in Jesuh kiangah, “Kei zong hong zuisak in,” ci-in a thum hi; ahi zongin Jesuh in

“Na inn-ah ciah in la, Pasian in nang-a' dingin bangzah takin na hong sepsak hiam, cihna thu va gen in,” ci-in a sawlkhia hi. A mipa zong ciah a, ama-a' dingin Jesuh' sepsakna thu khempeuh, khuasung tengah a gengen hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jairas' Tanu leh Jesuh' Puan A Lawng Numei

verses.text: Tuili galkhatah Jesuh hong ciahkik ciangin, ama hong ciahkik ding ngakin om niloh uh ahih manin mite na nuam mahmah uh hi
Tua laitakin kikhopna inn ukpi Jairas a kici mi khat hong pai-in Jesuh' khe phungah hong khukdin' a, ama inn-ah a paina dingin a thum hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kum sawmlenih a pha tanu khat a neihsun pen a ci na-in a si dektak hi. Jesuh zong tua inn zuan dingin a pai laitakin mihonpite in zui-in a nehcip uh hi
Tua laitakin kum sawmlenih tawntung siluang natna vei-in, a neih khempeuh siavuante cialna-in a zat hangin kuamah in a damsak zawhloh numei khat
mihonte lak Jesuh nungah hong pai-in Jesuh' puanmongteep lawngsim a, thakhatin a siluang a kangpah hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Kua in hong lawng na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Kuamah in, “Hong lawng ing,” a cihloh ciangin Peter in, “Topa aw, mi khempeuh in nang hong umcihin hong nehcip uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Ka sung panin vangliatna a paikhiat lamtak phawk ka hih manin mi khat in hong lawng hi,” a ci hi

Numei in amah a kiphawkna thu a theih ciangin a lingsa-in hong pai-in Jesuh mai-ah hong bok a, Jesuh a lawn'na thu leh amah a dampahna thuteng, tua lai-a om mi khempeuh' zakin Jesuh kiangah a pulak hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in numei kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, na upna in nang hong damsakzo hi; lungnuam takin na ciah in,” a ci hi
Tua bangin thu a gen laitakin kikhopna inn ukpa' inn panin kamtai khat hong tung a, “Na tanu si khinzo ta hi. Siapa gimsak nawn kei in,” a hong ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in hih thu a zak ciangin, kikhopna inn ukpa kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; upna nei peuh lecin na tanu a hingkik ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua inn-ah Jesuh a tun' ciangin Peter, Johan, leh James leh numeino' nu leh pa simloh kuamah dang, innsungah zuisak lo hi
Tua lai-a om mi khempeuh, tua numeino' sihna hangin kapin, thumin na om uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Kap nawn kei un, amah a si hilo hi; a ihmu bek ahi hi,” a ci hi
Amah a sihkhitna thei uh ahih manin Jesuh a nuihsan lel uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in numeino a khutin lenin, “Numeino aw, tho in,” a ci hi
Numeino zong hingkik a, thakhatin a thopah hi. Tua ciangin numeino' nekding an pia un, ci-in Jesuh in a sawl hi
Numeino' nu leh pa in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, ahi zongin hih thupiangte kuama kiangah a genlohna dingun Jesuh in a kham hi.
